PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-19-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Oct-04-2021, previously admitted in Colorado, is admitted to probate. Jacqueline Ann Sandhu is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Sep-25-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by Sep-18-2023, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-31-2022 Continued To Sep-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gilbert Premo, via Zoom, for Jacqueline S. Sandhu, Petitioner.

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. Counsel reports that the Supplemental Notice of the Hearing he mailed to Gundip Singh Sandhu was mailed to the wrong address. Counsel requests a continuance of the hearing to allow the Notice to be re-served.

The matter is continued to Sep-19-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-17-2022 Continued To Aug-31-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
